introSection: Hurricane is a steel roller coaster currently located at Western Playland in Sunland Park, New Mexico, USA. It originally opened in 1992 at Santa Cruz Beach Boardwalk in Santa Cruz, California, USA. It would be replaced with Undertow after being sold.
fullText:
Hurricane is a steel roller coaster currently located at Western Playland in Sunland Park, New Mexico, USA. It originally opened in 1992 at Santa Cruz Beach Boardwalk in Santa Cruz, California, USA. It would be replaced with Undertow after being sold.



Blue track and white supports.
